message:
test(robot): add filterWaitPanes unit tests (bd-2vzhz)

Add 10 table-driven tests for filterWaitPanes function, achieving 100%
coverage for this pure function:

- no_filters_returns_only_agents: verifies user/unknown panes filtered
- filter_by_pane_indices: tests specific pane index filtering
- filter_by_agent_type_claude: tests claude agent type filtering
- filter_by_agent_type_codex: tests codex agent type filtering
- filter_by_agent_type_gemini: tests gemini agent type filtering
- filter_by_both_indices_and_type: tests combined filtering
- empty_panes_input: handles edge case of empty input
- no_matching_indices: handles case with no matches
- case_insensitive_agent_type: verifies case-insensitive matching
- user_pane_always_filtered: confirms user panes excluded

Coverage: filterWaitPanes 0% → 100%
Package coverage: 45.1% → 45.5%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
